hooks.prompt: You are running an automatic reflection pass for the xstream project. The conversation is about to be compacted. Read the reflect skill at .claude/skills/reflect/SKILL.md and follow its instructions exactly.

hooks.command: printf '%s' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"UserPromptSubmit","additionalContext":"Policy: before starting implementation, design, or non-trivial research work, consult the `architect` subagent for architectural context. Skip only for tiny isolated tasks (typo fixes, renames, single-line bug fixes) or questions the architect has already answered earlier in this conversation."}}'

p=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.notebook_path // empty'); echo "$p" | grep -qE '(^|/)(client|server)/src/' && printf '%s' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"Policy: you just modified client or server source. If the change shifts architecture (new pattern, new service, new contract, removed module, changed invariant), update .claude/agents/architect.md in the same turn so the architect subagent stays current. Pure refactors, renames, or bug fixes with no architectural impact do not need an update."}}' || true
